posture: ~30-day stance: defer-by-default on the June NVDA tranche pending three hard gates (Israeli tax-substrate refresh by 2026-06-08, attorney retainer by 2026-06-10, analyst-substrate citation repair by 2026-06-15). Park the 2026-06-17 729-share RSU vest cash in SGOV pending patient UCITS deployment. Small parameterized UCITS top-up (CSPX or ACWD) permitted on RSU-vest proceeds while sector-cap and RSI conditions hold (preserved from prior cycle). Do NOT trim SCHD despite RSI 73.4 exit signal — capital-preservation theme (US-situs estate tail) wins over momentum. No speculative_candidates this cycle: substrate not repaired and bear-won debate on substrate-first grounds means speculation cap cannot be honored with disciplined risk_ceiling_check evidence.

themes.label: Defer-by-default execution stance on the June NVDA tranche
themes.rationale: Three open substrate gates + Commerce export-loophole news + neutral macro + Section 102 24-month trip-wire risk all point to default-defer over default-execute.

themes.rationale: SCHD RSI 73.4 (exit), VTV 71.19 (exit), VOO 69.16 at 52w high, QQQM 67.44, SCHG 68.25, SPMO 64.01. Hold what's held; don't add. (Note: technical analyst FAILED this cycle so RSI figures are from prior cycle and revalidation is pending.)

themes.rationale: NewsAnalyst materiality 0.55 with HIGH confidence. Real but not auto-actionable absent substrate gates clearing.

themes.rationale: SentimentAnalyst failed citations; TechnicalAnalyst FAILED; ConcentrationAnalyst missing plan_targets. Hard gate 2026-06-15 with auto-suspend authority.

actions.label: NVDA June tranche — execute only if THREE gates clear; otherwise auto-defer
actions.trigger_or_date: if(tax_memo_refreshed_by_2026-06-08 AND attorney_retainer_engaged_by_2026-06-10 AND analyst_substrate_repaired_by_2026-06-15) then execute up to 200 sh pre-vest from pre-2024 grants only; else defer to post-2026-06-17
actions.detail: 200 sh ceiling pre-vest, conditional on all three substrate gates AND lot-aware grant-date eligibility (Section 102 24mo cleared). Default: defer past the 729-sh vest and consolidate decision next cycle.
actions.rationale: Acting on broken substrate against Section 102 24mo risk + surtax-in-full is asymmetric downside; capital-preservation framing gives no licence to rush.

rationale: Short horizon is mechanical and substrate-gated this cycle. The bear-won debate is decisive: three open substrate gates (tax memo, attorney retainer, analyst remediation) + broad ETFs at 52w highs + Commerce export-loophole news + neutral macro + Section 102 24-month risk all mean default-defer-and-park, not execute-on-schedule. Material refinements vs prior draft #19: (a) preserve the parameterized UCITS top-up trigger from prior cycle (accepted delta retained); (b) refresh per-vest tax estimate to TaxAnalyst's $78,386 figure (prior $19,500 was undersized); (c) refresh days-to-vest to 15; (d) add W-8BEN currency verification (TaxAnalyst flagged as untracked); (e) re-add June RSU withholding adequacy check (lineage to prior draft #18); (f) add attorney retainer deadline as a tracked countdown target. No speculative candidates: substrate is not in a state where the speculation cap (≤0.10% of net worth ≈ $3,800 max; ≤3 concurrent) can be honored with disciplined risk_ceiling_check evidence, and pushing speculation while equity gates may auto-suspend would be incoherent. Confidence MEDIUM: tax-substrate domain files carry last_verified=1900-01-01 pending domain-refresh; sentiment+technical analysts FAILED this cycle.
